title: McAlive:Bloom
description: This pack changes the models and textures of flowers while trying to keep the vanilla style
body:
Hi! This pack changes the look of flowers by changing their model and textures for some flowers and also **adds 3 variants for each flower**.

**for those who prefer 2d items there is a 2d item version**: [mcalivebloom(2d-items)](https://modrinth.com/project/mcalivebloom(2d-items))

**There is also a optional addon resourcepack for this pack called** [McAlive:BushyBloom](https://modrinth.com/project/mcalivebushybloom)
**that makes rose, lilac, and peony bushes blocky like azalea**
  
![A look at BushyBloom addon pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e435f0ae005575a27f1cd2eff2f5f10cc1d71b82.png)
